movie.overview: At the height of the Vietnam war, Captain Benjamin Willard is sent on a dangerous mission that, officially, "does not exist, nor will it ever exist." His goal is to locate - and eliminate - a mysterious Green Beret Colonel named Walter Kurtz, who has been leading his personal army on illegal guerrilla missions into enemy territory.
movie.title: Apocalypse Now

cast.name: Jerry Ross
cast.character: Johnny from Malibu / Mike from San Diego
